---
title: "\'Thoughts on Scripture Texts\'"
---

## \'Thoughts on Scripture Texts\'

**Author:** Elizabeth Missing Sewell
**Date:** 1890, 1895
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (September, October 1890; March 1895)

### Notes

Sewell also published \'Thoughts on the Creed\' <i>MP</i> (July, September 1892).  

See also [[person:1301]Elizabeth Sewell].

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
